# Checklist

- [ ] Use the owner account that submitted registrar_reserve to sign the project information using the appropriate network tool ([Polkadot](https://polkadot.js.org/apps/?rpc=wss%3A%2F%2Frpc.polkadot.io#/signing), [Kusama](https://polkadot.js.org/apps/?rpc=wss%3A%2F%2Fkusama-rpc.polkadot.io#/signing), [Rococo](https://polkadot.js.org/apps/?rpc=wss%3A%2F%2Frococo-rpc.polkadot.io#/signing), [Westend](https://polkadot.js.org/apps/?rpc=wss%3A%2F%2Fwestend-rpc.polkadot.io#/signing)), and fill in the signature.
- [ ] After each update of the project information, please sign the latest data and submit the signature.
- [ ] Add a description for your pr, the description includes the original data.
- [ ] Fill up the signature of the original data, signature account to Signature Auto check.
